command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai
python3 << PYFIX
content = open('runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py').read()

# In _run_background_governed_phase_wave1, after we load the request_record,
# insert a backward-compat state normalization: if run-state shows queued, treat as launching
old_compat = "    run_id = workspace.name\n\n    # W1-03: Artifact-contract validation"
new_compat = "    run_id = workspace.name\n\n    # Backward compat: normalize 'queued' to 'launching' for old-style launches\n    _compat_state_path = workspace / \"run-state.json\"\n    if _compat_state_path.is_file():\n        try:\n            _compat_state = load_json(_compat_state_path)\n            if _compat_state.get(\"status\") == \"queued\":\n                _compat_state[\"status\"] = \"launching\"\n                atomic_write_json(_compat_state_path, _compat_state)\n        except Exception:\n            pass\n\n    # W1-03: Artifact-contract validation"

if old_compat in content:
    content = content.replace(old_compat, new_compat)
    print('Backward compat patch applied')
else:
    # Try finding it another way
    idx = content.find('run_id = workspace.name\n\n    # W1-03')
    if idx >= 0:
        print('Found at idx', idx)
    else:
        # Show context around run_id = workspace.name in wave1 function
        fn_start = content.find('def _run_background_governed_phase_wave1')
        if fn_start >= 0:
            chunk = content[fn_start:fn_start+2000]
            ridx = chunk.find('run_id = workspace.name')
            print(repr(chunk[ridx:ridx+200]))
        else:
            print('WARNING: function not found')

open('runtime/moreno_governed_executor.py', 'w').write(content)
import ast; ast.parse(content); print('SYNTAX OK')
PYFIX
ENDSSH
